description: Weather locations, current conditions, and forecasts from AccuWeather.

auth.label: API Key
auth.description: AccuWeather API key sent as an Authorization Bearer token. Create or copy a key from the AccuWeather developer portal subscriptions page: https://developer.accuweather.com/subscriptions.

actions.name: get_current_conditions
actions.description: Retrieve current weather conditions for an AccuWeather location key.

locationKey.description: The AccuWeather location key returned by a location search endpoint.

language.description: The AccuWeather language code used to localize results.

details.description: Whether AccuWeather should include optional extended details in the response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for an AccuWeather location-key request.

localObservationDateTime.description: The local observation timestamp returned by AccuWeather.

anyOf.description: The precipitation type, when AccuWeather returns one.

isDayTime.description: Whether the observation is during local daytime.

temperature.description: The raw nested object returned by AccuWeather.

mobileLink.description: The AccuWeather mobile URL for this condition.

link.description: The AccuWeather web URL for this condition.

conditions.description: The current condition records returned by AccuWeather.

actions.name: get_daily_forecast
actions.description: Retrieve a daily forecast for an AccuWeather location key using an official duration endpoint.

locationKey.description: The AccuWeather location key returned by a location search endpoint.

duration.description: The AccuWeather daily forecast duration endpoint to call.

language.description: The AccuWeather language code used to localize results.

details.description: Whether AccuWeather should include optional extended details in the response.

metric.description: Whether forecast values should be returned in metric units.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for an AccuWeather daily forecast request.

headline.description: The raw nested object returned by AccuWeather.

items.description: The raw nested object returned by AccuWeather.

dailyForecasts.description: The daily forecast records returned by AccuWeather.

actions.name: get_hourly_forecast
actions.description: Retrieve an hourly forecast for an AccuWeather location key using an official duration endpoint.

locationKey.description: The AccuWeather location key returned by a location search endpoint.

duration.description: The AccuWeather hourly forecast duration endpoint to call.

language.description: The AccuWeather language code used to localize results.

details.description: Whether AccuWeather should include optional extended details in the response.

metric.description: Whether forecast values should be returned in metric units.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for an AccuWeather hourly forecast request.

items.description: The raw nested object returned by AccuWeather.

forecasts.description: The hourly forecast records returned by AccuWeather.

actions.name: get_location_by_geoposition
actions.description: Resolve latitude and longitude coordinates to a single AccuWeather location key.

language.description: The AccuWeather language code used to localize results.

details.description: Whether AccuWeather should include optional extended details in the response.

topLevel.description: Whether AccuWeather should return only top-level administrative data.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for resolving an AccuWeather location by coordinates.

localizedName.description: The localized location name returned by AccuWeather.

englishName.description: The English location name returned by AccuWeather.

type.description: The AccuWeather location type, such as City.

rank.description: The AccuWeather ranking value for this location.

country.description: The raw nested object returned by AccuWeather.

administrativeArea.description: The raw nested object returned by AccuWeather.

actions.name: search_locations
actions.description: Search AccuWeather locations by text and return normalized location keys for weather requests.

query.description: The city, postal code, or place text to search for.

language.description: The AccuWeather language code used to localize results.

details.description: Whether AccuWeather should include optional extended details in the response.

offset.description: The result offset requested from AccuWeather.

alias.description: The AccuWeather alias mode: 0 for always, 1 for never, or 2 only when no official match exists.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for searching AccuWeather locations by text.

localizedName.description: The localized location name returned by AccuWeather.

englishName.description: The English location name returned by AccuWeather.

type.description: The AccuWeather location type, such as City.

rank.description: The AccuWeather ranking value for this location.

country.description: The raw nested object returned by AccuWeather.

administrativeArea.description: The raw nested object returned by AccuWeather.
